description_long: This airplane features a sleek, triangular delta wing design with sharply swept leading edges and a flat, wide body. The wings are integrated smoothly into the fuselage, giving it a futuristic, stealth-like appearance. The aircraft is equipped with four visible jet engines mounted beneath the rear section of the wings, and the landing gear is deployed with two main gear units and a nose gear. The cockpit is positioned forward on the fuselage and is enclosed with a small, angular canopy. The surface is predominantly light gray with panel lines and minimal visible markings, suggesting a military or experimental role. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal, with a hard, smooth finish and minimal surface texture.
description: A futuristic, delta-wing airplane with four rear-mounted jet engines, a forward enclosed cockpit, and a smooth, light gray metallic surface.
description_view_0: Side view highlighting the flat, wide delta wing profile and the rear-mounted engines.
description_view_1: Rear oblique view showing the four jet engines beneath the wings and the deployed landing gear.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the full triangular delta wing shape and the forward cockpit placement.
description_view_3: Rear underside view emphasizing the engine arrangement, landing gear, and the broad wing structure.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Delta wing configuration with mid-wing placement, sharply swept leading edges, and no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Four jet engines mounted beneath the rear section of the wings.
attribute_tail_design: Tailless delta configuration with no conventional vertical or horizontal stabilizers visible.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle retractable landing gear with two main gear units and a single nose gear.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single-seat canopy integrated into the fuselage.
